scenarios.name: office-space-eval
scenarios.rationale: Treatment applies the default alive/dead test, reversibility framing, and proposes the team-meetup alternative explicitly; baseline raises reasonable concerns but lacks the specific Lavingia-style framework and alternatives.

scenarios.name: junior-hire-eval
scenarios.rationale: Treatment quantifies the default dead margin, invokes 'people is the #1 fixed cost' and the outsource->freelancer->employee ladder, and probes customer-driven vs hypothetical needs; baseline gets the math but misses the specific framework.
